chunks.title: Sales Pitch Scripts & Conversation Frameworks — Adapting Your Pitch for Different Client Types
chunks.content:
One size does not fit all. Here is how to adapt your AIF pitch for different client types:

The Business Owner:
Language they understand: Growth, equity, scaling, risk-reward, exits.
Pitch angle: "This fund invests the same way you built your business — by taking equity stakes in growing companies. The fund manager's job is what you do daily: identify great businesses, invest, and help them scale. You're essentially backing a professional version of your own entrepreneurial instinct."
